title: Entropy SMP Pack
description: A (relatively) small pack that adds many visual, performance, and QoL mods for an overall better experience
body:
A relatively small pack (~50 mods) designed around being lightweight and performant while still including useful and fun mods. Features include:

- Performance mods to give an overall smoother experience
- QoL mods such as Jade, REI, Armored Elytra, and Reacharound
- Other useful mods such as Distant Horizons, Open Parties and Claims, and Do A Barrel Roll

This pack was designed as a client-side complement to the Entropy SMP, but it can function as a client-side pack for other servers.
